title: harnessed service
description: A shared sidecar service definition (catalog/services/<name>/service.yaml). Its own image/container/volume on a host-published port, with a lifecycle independent of any instance. A recipe references it via mcp.servers[].service. See docs/harnessed-design.md §3/§9.

name.description: Service identity. Global by name (e.g. hindsight) — reached via host.containers.internal:<port>, or by DNS name over the HARNESSED_NET bridge.

image.description: The container image tag for this service (e.g. harnessed-ping:latest).

port.description: The host-published port the service listens on (1–65535). Peers reach it at host.containers.internal:<port>.

volume.description: Service-scoped, harness-independent named volume (defaults to <name>-data). Persists across `svc down`.

healthcheck.description: Shell command used as the container healthcheck (e.g. curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health || exit 1).
